name: io.github.visus-mcp/visus-mcp
description: Security-first web access. Sanitizes pages, blocks injection, redacts PII. Now with PDF/JSON/SVG.

environmentVariables.name: VISUS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for page fetching (default: 10000)

environmentVariables.name: VISUS_MAX_CONTENT_KB
environmentVariables.description: Optional maximum content size in KB before truncation (default: 512)

environmentVariables.name: VISUS_RENDERER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional URL for managed Lambda renderer (Phase 2 - not yet available)

buildInfo.release: v0.13.0 — Glassworm malware detection for steganographic Unicode attacks
